author: jaewone
description: Helps you styling checkboxes in preview mode.

manifest.author: JaewonE
manifest.description: Render theme-independent SVG icon bullets from plain Markdown markers.
manifest.name: Icon Bullet Helper

name: Icon Bullet Helper

releases.author: jaewonE
releases.description:
**Changed**

- Add README callouts below the title to explain that the existing `checkbox-styling-helper` listing now provides the more complete Codex-built Icon Bullet Helper experience.
- Link users to the renamed `icon-bullet-helper` GitHub repository.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jaewonE/icon-bullet-helper/compare/2.0.2...2.0.3
releases.name: 2.0.3 Releases

releases.author: jaewonE
releases.description:
**Fixed**

- Restore the Obsidian plugin manifest ID to `checkbox-styling-helper`.
- Restore manual installation paths to the existing plugin ID directory.
- Keep repository links on the renamed `icon-bullet-helper` GitHub repository.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jaewonE/icon-bullet-helper/compare/2.0.1...2.0.2
releases.name: 2.0.2 Releases

releases.author: jaewonE
releases.description:
**Key Features**

- The repository is now published at https://github.com/jaewonE/icon-bullet-helper.
- The plugin manifest ID is now `icon-bullet-helper`.
- README links now point to the renamed repository and include `assets/demo.png`.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jaewonE/icon-bullet-helper/compare/2.0.0...2.0.1
releases.name: 2.0.1 Releases

releases.author: jaewonE
releases.description:
**Key Features**

- Checkbox Styling Helper is now distributed as Icon Bullet Helper with theme-independent SVG icon bullets.
- Markdown source text is preserved with `{marker}` and `{!marker}` syntax rendered in Live Preview and Reading view.
- The icon picker supports hotkey and list-trigger opening with isolated keyboard navigation.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jaewonE/checkbox-styling-helper/compare/1.3.0...2.0.0
releases.name: 2.0.0 Releases

releases.author: jaewonE
releases.description:
**Key Features**

- Checkbox styling helper now supports [Border theme](https://github.com/Akifyss/obsidian-border).
- Triggers also work inside callouts.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jaewonE/checkbox-styling-helper/compare/1.2.1...1.3.0
releases.name: 1.3.0 Releases

releases.author: jaewonE
releases.description:
- [1419473](https://github.com/jaewonE/checkbox-styling-helper/commit/14194737c4544490b1ce758dac8a9ddeabe936e7): Fixed bug where numbers were not properly applied to triggers

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jaewonE/checkbox-styling-helper/compare/1.2.0...1.2.1
releases.name: v1.2.1 Releases

releases.author: jaewonE
releases.description:
**Key Changes:**
1. Added five basic icons: number, unordered list, empty checkbox, half done, etc.
2. Provided a hot key to open the icon picker.
3. Enabled setting an icon via command even if there is already text on the current line.
4. Enabled changing an icon via command even if an icon is already set on the current line.
5. Allowed customization of the trigger.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jaewonE/checkbox-styling-helper/compare/1.1.0...1.2.0
releases.name: v1.2.0 Relases

releases.author: jaewonE
releases.description:
- [e3b78f1](https://github.com/jaewonE/checkbox-styling-helper/commit/e3b78f1d2ecd9a6bca4536a2575f1a0412381333): Add custom icon order settings.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jaewonE/checkbox-styling-helper/compare/1.0.7...1.1.0
releases.name: v1.1.0 Add custom icon order settings.

releases.author: jaewonE
releases.description:
We have confirmed that it works on both Android and iOS, so we will change isDesktopOnly to False.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jaewonE/checkbox-styling-helper/compare/1.0.5...1.0.6
releases.name: v1.0.6 Releases

releases.author: jaewonE
releases.description:
- [47ca2ab](https://github.com/jaewonE/checkbox-styling-helper/commit/47ca2ab567917bfd300f6de2d899986755f42e84): Remove unnecessary logging from code and tags from manifest.
- [c291f3a](https://github.com/jaewonE/checkbox-styling-helper/commit/c291f3a6cbea372f4312ac5764ad694e3cf073d9): Remove unused icons from icons_Things array
releases.name: v1.0.5 Releases

releases.author: jaewonE
releases.description: - [e7cda8a](https://github.com/jaewonE/checkbox-styling-helper/commit/e7cda8a7a2605af3a3251ef013711bf2b5b918a3): Fixed an error where the cursor was not positioned properly.
releases.name: v1.0.3 Releases

releases.author: jaewonE
releases.description: - [b4b7bac](https://github.com/jaewonE/obsidian-checkbox-styling-helper/commit/b4b7bac7114ec6322d6f859dbf042ebdbc2b6761) Integrates how to use the Things theme and other themes.
releases.name: v1.0.2 Releases

releases.author: jaewonE
releases.description:
- If you are using the Things theme, please use `Things_checkbox_styling_helper.zip`.

- Otherwise, please use `ect_checkbox_styling_helper.zip`.
releases.name: v1.0.1 Releases
